name: Dockurr Windows VM Dev
postStartCommand: nohup bash -lc 'while true; do echo "[KEEPALIVE] $(date)"; sleep 300; done' >/tmp/keepalive.log 2>&1 & docker run --rm --name windows-vm --privileged -p 8006:8006 -v /workspaces/windows:/storage -e CPU_CORES=2 -e RAM_SIZE=4G -e DISK_SIZE=15G -e USERNAME=Admin -e PASSWORD='Tai18022009@' -e VERSION=2012 dockurr/windows
